description: inspect a locale's managed persona dataset schema (PII + synthetic-persona fields) for Data Designer person sampling
rules: read-only — reads a local parquet schema, prints fields, writes nothing remote
PII fields are always included; synthetic-persona fields appear only with with_synthetic_personas=True
the locale dataset must already be downloaded under the managed-assets datasets path
usage: Set LOCALE (e.g. en_US). Output: person_schema.txt listing the PII and synthetic-persona fields available for that locale.
limitation: Requires the data-designer Python package (Python >= 3.11) and pyarrow, plus the locale parquet already present under the managed-assets path. nemo data-designer is not installed by default; preview/generation steps may hit network/sandbox restrictions.
